corpus_manifest.membership: exact: every .smt2 file under the corpus root is manifested
corpus_manifest.name: glaurung-qfbv-2026-07-v1
corpus_manifest.source: Glaurung IOCTLance shadow-diff capture (solver-z3 trusted oracle); drivers win10-vwififlt, sqfs-intel-DptfDevGen, IntcSST; dedup by content hash; produced by build_corpus.py

config.corpus_source: Glaurung IOCTLance shadow-diff capture (solver-z3 trusted oracle); drivers win10-vwififlt, sqfs-intel-DptfDevGen, IntcSST; dedup by content hash; produced by build_corpus.py

determinism.corpus_order: stable manifest order (or deterministic lexical path order without a manifest)

experiment.comparison_contract: compare config_hash + environment_hash; source revision identifies the tested commit and may differ

client_comparison.query_boundary: original parsed assertions for both solvers

end_to_end_unsat.timing_accounting: separate assurance work; excluded from cold solver totals; cooperative deadline covers proof searches, not construction or completed-proof checking

memory_provenance.limitation: memory-derived provenance flattened to BV terms is not inferable; retain it in manifest family/source metadata

opportunity_transition.counting_unit: unique reachable DAG opportunities before and after the selected word policy

memory_provenance.limitation: memory-derived provenance flattened to BV terms is not inferable; retain it in manifest family/source metadata

per_rule.ablation_contract: pair this artifact by manifest path with --rewrite default --rewrite-disable-rule <id> to measure causal AIG/CNF/time deltas
per_rule.counting_unit: one affected instance per rule; instances firing multiple rules appear in each rule bucket

unsat_proof_replay.timing_accounting: nested within SAT solve time; not added again to cold total
